specialties.name: Hull Painter
specialties.description: Bringing color to the giant husks of old spacefarers

specialties.name: Staircase Poet
specialties.description: Reciting poetry on the steep stairs of the Chasm

specialties.name: Maidy Row Balladeer
specialties.description: Singing ballads and anthems for the people of Ship City

specialties.name: Alley Theater Actor
specialties.description: Performing lead roles in small alley theaters

specialties.name: Occasional Publisher
specialties.description: Writing and publishing gossip pamphlets

specialties.name: Machine Artisan
specialties.description: Crafting automata, lighting contraptions, and mechanical devices

talents.name: Acrobat
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level to jumping, climbing, and running

talents.name: Charmer
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level when rolling for Empathy to make an NPC like you

talents.name: Cultural Savant
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level to understand customs and cultural habits in the Lost Horizon

talents.name: Renowned
talents.effect: You can push any roll based on Empathy twice, not just once like other characters

specialties.name: Zapti Constable
specialties.description: Patrolling boroughs and enforcing Guild law

specialties.name: Guild Militia
specialties.description: Protecting, surveilling, and retrieving for the Guilds

specialties.name: Fusillard Protector
specialties.description: Shielding clients from attacks with fusillard and armor

specialties.name: Guild Investigator
specialties.description: Solving complex crimes for the Guilds and private patrons

specialties.name: Coriolite Guard
specialties.description: Guarding Coriolite families with martial skill and presentation

specialties.name: Bounty Hunter
specialties.description: Tracking and capturing bounties across Jumuah

talents.name: Weapon Talent
talents.effect: The Enforcer selects one weapon talent from the available options

weaponTalentOptions.name: Blade Fighter
weaponTalentOptions.effect: +1 base die per talent level to close combat rolls when fighting with blade weapons, i.e. swords, knives, axes and spears

weaponTalentOptions.name: Bowman
weaponTalentOptions.effect: +1 base die per talent level when firing a bow or crossbow

weaponTalentOptions.name: Demolitions Expert
weaponTalentOptions.effect: +1 base die per talent level when using explosive weapons, including hand grenades and improvised explosives

weaponTalentOptions.name: Heavy Weapons
weaponTalentOptions.effect: +1 base die per talent level when firing heavy weapons such as rocket launchers, flamers, and vehicle mounted weapons

weaponTalentOptions.name: Pistoleer
weaponTalentOptions.effect: +1 base die per talent level when firing a pistol

weaponTalentOptions.name: Polearms
weaponTalentOptions.effect: +1 base die per talent level to close combat rolls when using blunt weapons

weaponTalentOptions.name: Pugilist
weaponTalentOptions.effect: +1 base die per talent level to close combat rolls when fighting unarmed

weaponTalentOptions.name: Sharpshooter
weaponTalentOptions.effect: +1 base die per talent level when firing a long barreled gun, such as a rifle or a carbine

talents.name: Commander
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level when trying to help a person broken by despair

talents.name: Evasive
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level to Agility rolls for dodging ranged attacks

talents.name: Medic
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level when trying to help someone broken by damage. Medical equipment give you gear dice.

specialties.name: Spice Engineer
specialties.description: Experimenting with orchid dust and ingredients in a makeshift laboratory

specialties.name: Bird Warden
specialties.description: Caring for Birds, ornithiums, and other critters

specialties.name: Coriolite Seer
specialties.description: Reading fate with tea leaves, old bones, and dice

specialties.name: Revolutionary Prophet
specialties.description: Using fiery rhetoric to lead the people toward liberation

specialties.name: Toad Dreamer
specialties.description: Chasing epiphanies and truth through orchid dust dreams

specialties.name: Rim Zealot
specialties.description: Preaching expansion of the colonies beyond Jumuah

talents.name: Actor
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level when rolling to bluff or tell a lie to an NPC

talents.name: Botanist
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level for cultivating plants or fungi as well as understanding flora and ivy

talents.name: Cultural Savant
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level to understand customs and cultural habits in the Lost Horizon

talents.name: Librarian
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level when using a library or info cubes to find information

startingEquipmentSets.name: Bird Candy
startingEquipmentSets.description: Treats for attracting and calming Birds

startingEquipmentSets.name: Flask with Makh Spirits
startingEquipmentSets.description: Strong liquor from the Turbine Halls

specialties.name: Guild Clerk
specialties.description: Sorting mail, taking notes, and handling tasks for a Guild master

specialties.name: Stair Peddler
specialties.description: Selling goods on the steep stairs of the Chasm

specialties.name: Ice Trader
specialties.description: Trading ice bonds to Guilds and merchants

specialties.name: Alley Cook
specialties.description: Making stews and grilling skewers in a small street stall

specialties.name: Coriolite Servant
specialties.description: Serving a Coriolite noble and learning the ways of the Old Horizon

specialties.name: Artifact Dealer
specialties.description: Buying and selling artifacts from across the Charted Sphere

talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level when rolling to bluff or tell a lie to an NPC

talents.name: Charmer
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level when rolling for Empathy to make an NPC like you

talents.name: Cultural Savant
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level to understand customs and cultural habits in the Lost Horizon

talents.name: Streetwise
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level for acquiring stolen goods, finding a contact, or hearing rumors in Ship City and the colonies

startingEquipmentSets.name: Cooking Utensils
startingEquipmentSets.description: Pots, pans, and tools for cooking

specialties.name: Hull Guard
specialties.description: Keeping watch on ship hulls, alert to turbulence and radiation

specialties.name: Wreck Diver
specialties.description: Spotting entry points and securing treasures from old wrecks

specialties.name: Vacuum Welder
specialties.description: Freelance welding in dangerous zero-gravity environments

specialties.name: Deep Miner
specialties.description: Digging, burrowing, and blasting in deep asteroid mines

specialties.name: Crane Rat
specialties.description: Climbing, jumping, and securing cargo in harbors and the Bay

specialties.name: Machine Tender
specialties.description: Disassembling and reassembling machines, circuits, and gizmos

talents.name: Endurance
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level for resisting vacuum, suffocation, and cold

talents.name: Force
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level to lift, push, or break something heavy or solid

talents.name: Jury-Rig
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level when rolling to craft or jury-rig mechanical machinery

talents.name: Scan Operator
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level to scan an area for its configuration, Blight, or other threats

specialties.name: Guild Archivist
specialties.description: Archiving, cataloging, and organizing Guild knowledge

specialties.name: Algebraist Apprentice
specialties.description: Studying the old art of al-jabr and the threads of the universe

specialties.name: Slipstream Cartographer
specialties.description: Mapping uncharted territories and star lanes

specialties.name: Diaspora Historian
specialties.description: Studying the history of the Diaspora fleet and modern society

specialties.name: Cave Botanist
specialties.description: Studying plants, fungi, and the Blight in the Cave Gardens

specialties.name: Builder Archaeologist
specialties.description: Examining Builder ruins, shards, and monuments

talents.name: Investigator
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level when searching an area for clues

talents.name: Librarian
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level when using a library or info cubes to find information

talents.name: Smart
talents.effect: You can push any roll based on Logic twice

talents.name: Teratology
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level to know and understand the beasts of the Great Dark

specialties.name: Dust Runner
specialties.description: Running orchid dust for the Toads all over the Rock

specialties.name: Tech Smuggler
specialties.description: Smuggling shards and Old Horizon tech past Guild quarantine

specialties.name: Guild Spy
specialties.description: Gathering intelligence and working in the shadows for a Guild

specialties.name: Alley Thug
specialties.description: Odd jobs as bouncer, enforcer, and debt collector

specialties.name: Hull Cutter
specialties.description: Stripping gear from vessels to sell on the black market

specialties.name: Con Artist
specialties.description: Fooling the gullible with a range of characters and performances

talents.name: Acrobat
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level to jumping, climbing, and running

talents.name: Charmer
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level when rolling for Empathy to make an NPC like you

talents.name: Lookout
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level to rolls for spotting approaching threats

talents.name: Stealthy
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level for staying hidden. Cannot be used for ambushes.

specialties.name: Tugship Pilot
specialties.description: Navigating the miasma and steering ships into dock

specialties.name: Hull Warden
specialties.description: Detecting leaks and faulty piping in the holds of ships

specialties.name: Guild Surveyor
specialties.description: Scouring the system for hidden treasures with scanners

specialties.name: Kite Handler
specialties.description: Operating kites, the near-intelligent contraptions of the Machinists

specialties.name: Lighthouse Keeper
specialties.description: Servicing radio buoys and keeping the space lanes safe

specialties.name: Asteroid Hauler
specialties.description: Herding boulders across the vast expanse of space

talents.name: Driver
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level for driving any kind of ground vehicle

talents.name: Mechanic
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level for repairing vehicles and other mechanical devices. You also get +1 die per talent level to close combat rolls when fighting with any kind of tools, such as drills, hammers, and cutting torches.

talents.name: Exo-Specialist
talents.effect: +1 base die per talent level when handling an exo of some kind

talents.name: Zero-G Training
talents.effect: You suffer no negative effects when operating in zero gravity environments
